title: aspidium biserratum var. furcans
intro: Aspidium biserratum var. furcans, also known as the Forked Lady Fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Traditionally, the Forked Lady Fern has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of the Forked Lady Fern include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
